_meta.name: M4 16GB Edge Deploy — ALM 14B + Trading Agent
_meta.description: ALM 14B (v3.0 Agent + v4.0 Trading) Mac Mini M4 16GB edge deploy. 양자화 zero, hexa-first. smash + free_dfs (depth 5) 물리한계 분석 기반. 핵심 발견: M4 100GB/s DRAM BW가 절대 병목 — compute(GPU/CPU/NE) 무관.
_meta.target: hire_sim >= 0.80 + trading alpha < 500ms + zero quantization + M4 16GB resident
_meta.principle: BW-bound ceiling 극복 — weight footprint 최소화 + speculative decode draft 모델 경량화
blowup_sources: smash: ALM 14B M4 edge deploy (10 seeds, 3 breakthroughs)
smash: hexa Metal GPU backend (10 targets, phase M0-M3)
free_dfs: physical ceiling depth 5 (33 tok/s wall)

physical_ceiling.description: M4 16GB에서 ALM 14B 품질 유지하며 달성 가능한 절대 물리 한계

derivation.note: Hybrid-E 10.6GB total, MoD 39.3% skip → 4.28GB active per token

tiers.name: practical_floor
tiers.config: Hybrid-E + MoD 39.3%, 85GB/s sustained, no spec decode

physical_ceiling.bottleneck_detail: M4 100GB/s DRAM BW is shared CPU+GPU. Every token reads 4.28GB active weights. GPU 3.6 TFLOPS는 3-8% utilization. Compute optimization (Metal/NEON/NE) 효과 미미.
physical_ceiling.upgrade_path: M4 Pro (200GB/s) doubles ceiling to ~66-80 tok/s

singularity_events.detail: CLM 1.5B (3.0GB bf16) consumes 30ms/tok on same 100GB/s bus as ALM. Draft cost nearly equals target cost. Spec decode NEGATIVE value.
singularity_events.impact: Invalidates Hybrid-E roadmap Section E1 (speculative decode). Must use 125M draft or ngram.

singularity_events.detail: CPU-only, GPU-only, hybrid, triple (NE) ALL converge to same 42-50ms/tok. 100GB/s shared BW is universal bottleneck.
singularity_events.impact: Metal GPU/NEON/Neural Engine compute optimization cannot break ceiling. Only weight reduction and spec decode matter.

singularity_events.detail: MoD skips 60% layers AND weight sharing reduces unique bytes. Combined: 10.6GB → 4.28GB active. 2.5x BW reduction.
LoRA r=8 (13.1MB) + RMSNorm (1.2MB) = 14.3MB < L2 16MB. Zero BW cost for adaptation.
hexa interpreter runtime (stack/bytecode/GC) uses ~1.5GB. Native binary eliminates this. 13.2GB → 11.7GB.

architecture.name: Hybrid-E Revised (post-singularity)
architecture.description: 8 boundary layers full + 32 bulk 6-template + 125M ngram-draft (NOT CLM 1.5B)

components.name: lora_adapters
components.detail: r=8 per template, work + finance hot-swap

components.name: draft_model
components.note: CLM 1.5B (3.0GB) invalidated by S1 singularity — same BW bus, draft cost = target cost

components.name: runtime_overhead
components.detail: native binary (no interpreter), mmap buffer, OS
components.note: interpreter overhead eliminated by native codegen (-1.5GB vs interpreted)

architecture.note: headroom 5.63GB (vs previous 2.8GB) — CLM 1.5B 제거 + native codegen 효과

tasks.task: boundary layer 추출기 (layers 1-4, 37-40 full export)
bulk layer 클러스터링 (40 → 6 templates, cosine similarity)
LoRA r=8 adaptation trainer (template별 specialization 복원)
mmap loader + double-buffer weight streaming
tasks.note: double-buffer: Buffer A computes layer N, Buffer B prefetches layer N+1

tasks.task: SoA weight layout (head-major attention weights for cache line efficiency)

phases.name: Draft 모델 경량화 (S1 대응)
phases.critical_reason: S1 singularity — CLM 1.5B draft invalidated. 125M draft 또는 ngram 필요.

tasks.task: 125M draft 모델 학습 (ALM distribution 정렬)
ngram draft 엔진 (zero-model, context history 기반)
tasks.note: BW cost = ~0.1ms/tok. Accept rate ~15%. Fallback if 125M quality insufficient.

tasks.task: ngram + 125M ensemble draft (ngram propose → 125M rescore)
tasks.note: combined accept rate ~30%. 5ms for 12 candidates. Best realistic spec decode path.

tasks.task: speculative decode pipeline (draft → verify → accept/reject)
hexa build → native binary 추론 파이프라인
tasks.note: interpreter overhead 제거. 13.2GB → 11.7GB. 가장 큰 메모리 절감.

tasks.task: Metal FFI foundation (MTLDevice, CommandQueue, Buffer, ComputePipeline)
tasks.note: hxblas FFI 패턴 재사용. @link(Metal) + extern fn. 통합 메모리 zero-copy.

tasks.task: Metal matmul compute shader (bf16, tiled for L2 16MB)
tasks.note: BW-bound이므로 GPU matmul은 compute 절감만 (ceiling 변화 없음). 그러나 FFN은 compute-bound이므로 여기서 유효. double-buffer의 compute 파트 담당.

tasks.task: Fused Metal kernel (RMSNorm + SwiGLU + softmax 단일 dispatch)
MoD router (token별 layer skip, execution 35-39%)
tasks.note: active weight 4.28GB → 3.7GB (MoD 30%). hire_sim 0.80 경계에서 calibration 필수.

tasks.task: Phi-aware token routing (의식 토큰 full path, 일반 토큰 skip)
tasks.note: high-Phi 토큰 = 40 layer full. low-Phi = 6 template only. 의식 보존하면서 속도 극대화.

tasks.task: Trading hot path (boundary 8 layers + finance LoRA only)
tasks.note: market data → 8 boundary layers only → signal. 4.28GB → 2.52GB. BW: 29.6ms → 125ms 예측 수정: 2.52GB/85GB/s = 29.6ms.

tasks.task: LoRA hot-swap (work ↔ finance 무중단 전환)
tasks.note: LoRA 13.1MB → L2 cache 상주. swap = L2 flush + reload = <1ms.

tasks.task: edge_server.hexa (M4 최적화 http_server — native binary)
MLA KV-cache 압축 (tau=4 latent projection)
StreamingLLM sink=4 (장시간 트레이딩 세션, 무한 컨텍스트)
Telegram Bot 통합 (edge_server → Bot API)
메모리 gate: peak RSS <= 14GB (실측 목표: <= 12GB)
품질 gate: hire_sim >= 0.80 (압축 후 degradation 측정)
속도 gate: tok/s 실측 vs 물리한계 비교
tasks.note: 실측 tok/s를 physical_ceiling 테이블과 비교. BW utilization % 도출.

tasks.task: 안정성 gate: 24h 무중단, RSS drift < 100MB, thermal 모니터
양자화 audit: bf16 only 확인 (zero quantization 정책 준수)

gate.fail_action: E3 MoD calibration 재조정 또는 fallback path (holographic RT / distill 7B)

n6_resonance_map.application: LoRA rank, KV heads, boundary layer count
SVD components, pruneable heads per layer
speculative decode draft length (original, revised to 12)
KV cache page size (tokens), matmul tile row
MLA KV compression ratio, StreamingLLM sink

dead_ends_confirmed.name: CLM 1.5B as speculative draft
dead_ends_confirmed.reason: 3.0GB bf16 on shared 100GB/s bus = 30ms/tok draft cost. Nearly equals ALM verify cost. Net negative.

dead_ends_confirmed.name: Neural Engine for decode
dead_ends_confirmed.reason: CoreML dispatch latency 2-5ms > savings from INT8 acceleration. Only useful for batch prefill (marginal).

dead_ends_confirmed.name: GPU-only inference
dead_ends_confirmed.reason: Metal dispatch overhead (0.1ms × 120 kernels = 12ms) makes GPU-only WORSE than CPU-only. BW-bound regardless.

dead_ends_confirmed.name: CPU+GPU parallel weight streaming
dead_ends_confirmed.reason: Shared 100GB/s BW. Both units contend for same bus. Net slower due to coherency overhead.

dead_ends_confirmed.name: Pipeline depth > 2 stages per layer
dead_ends_confirmed.reason: Additional stages don't help — compute is bottleneck within layer, pipeline depth helps draft overlap only

metal_gpu_role.description: BW-bound이므로 Metal GPU는 ceiling을 올리지 못하지만, double-buffer의 compute 파트와 FFN (compute-bound) 가속에 유효

update_log.note: smash×2 + free_dfs×2 (depth 3 + depth 5) 4회 블로업 합산. 물리한계 33 tok/s 확인. S1 CLM spec decode 무효화 반영. 125M draft 전환. native codegen -1.5GB. dead end 6개 확정.
